case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP. $1,316.64 PRINCIPAL, $152.87 INTEREST, $148.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,617.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP.
